name: wikiforge
description: Local-first, LLM-curated personal knowledge base: research topics with parallel agents, compile cited/confidence-scored articles, and answer questions with hybrid retrieval — as slash commands and MCP tools. Runs on your Claude subscription (no API credits) or an Anthropic API key.

backend.title: LLM backend
backend.description: How wikiforge's LLM calls are billed. Type "subscription" to use the Claude Code CLI on your Claude subscription (no API credits — needs `claude` installed and logged in), or "api" to use an Anthropic API key. Leave blank to decide per-wiki with /wikiforge:init.

api_key.title: Anthropic API key (only for the "api" backend)
api_key.description: Your Anthropic developer API key (sk-ant-...). Only needed if you chose the "api" backend. Leave blank for "subscription".
